_note: Overrides our ephemeris (pyswisseph/Lahiri) calculation with the physical Kohinoor Panjika whenever they disagree. Add entries here whenever you spot a mismatch against your physical copy — this file always wins over the engine's own math. tithi_odia is included so the displayed tithi row stays consistent with the overridden flag (avoids a card showing 'Dashami' next to an 'Ekadashi vrata' badge).

2026-06-24.reason: Kohinoor Panjika shows Nirjala Ekadashi on 24th; our engine computed 25th
